/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/domain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/repo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/rentalcart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/tests.cpp.o -o app -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
